notes: PBP2a; defines MRSA. SCCmec mobile element. Gold-standard diagnostic target.
mecA homolog in SCCmec XI; missed by some mecA PCRs (Podkowik 2025)
Vancomycin resistance operon; defines VRSA. Transferred from Enterococcus.
Primary FQ resistance mutation in S. aureus QRDR
Topoisomerase IV ParC equivalent; primary FQ target in S. aureus
Rifampicin resistance; RRDR cluster I. Equivalent to E. coli H526N.
Fusidic acid resistance; EF-G domain III mutation
rRNA methylase; MLSb resistance (macrolides, lincosamides, streptogramin B)
Daptomycin non-susceptibility; gain-of-function increasing lysyl-PG. Weak genotype-phenotype correlation — mechanism requires membrane charge shift, not single SNP.
